response:

These records do **not** provide any information about Anthony Callea's performance of Simon & Garfunkel songs or any song that was a follow-up single to "The Boxer" on Australian Idol.

- There is no evidence to support the claim that Anthony Callea performed a Simon & Garfunkel song that was a follow-up single to "The Boxer" on Australian Idol.
